name: bee-fibra-api
description: API de gestão de clientes - Bee Fibra

scripts.migrate: DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5435 DB_NAME=db_formulario DB_USER=postgres DB_PASSWORD=senha tsx node_modules/.bin/knex --knexfile src/db/knexfile.ts migrate:latest
scripts.seed:cotaweb: DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5435 DB_NAME=db_formulario DB_USER=postgres DB_PASSWORD=senha tsx node_modules/.bin/knex --knexfile src/db/knexfile.ts seed:run --specific=002_cotaweb_dados.ts
scripts.seed: DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5435 DB_NAME=db_formulario DB_USER=postgres DB_PASSWORD=senha tsx node_modules/.bin/knex --knexfile src/db/knexfile.ts seed:run
scripts.migrate:rollback: DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5435 DB_NAME=db_formulario DB_USER=postgres DB_PASSWORD=senha tsx node_modules/.bin/knex --knexfile src/db/knexfile.ts migrate:rollback
